entities.name: ICTP 8203
entities.description: A new variety of pearlmillet released in 1988 with high yield and disease resistance

entities.name: WCC75
entities.description: A standard pearlmillet cultivar used as a benchmark for yield comparison

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India where ICTP 8203 was released and showed a 7% yield increase over WCC75

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where ICTP 8203 was released and showed an 11% yield increase over WCC75

entities.name: TOGO
entities.description: The location of the large-grained landrace used in the recombination process

entities.name: RECOMBINATION
entities.description: The breeding method involving 5 progenies from a landrace to create ICTP 8203

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The pathogen organism that causes downy mildew in pearlmillet

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: The trait of being resistant to the pathogen Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The trait of having large, dark grey grains with a 1000-grain weight exceeding 12 g

entities.name: COMPACT SPIKES
entities.description: The morphological trait of having densely packed spikes

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The environmental condition of water scarcity

entities.name: INFERTILE SOILS
entities.description: The environmental condition of nutrient-poor soil

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity trait, measured in t/ha, which for ICTP 8203 averages 2.12 t/ha
